    M

    main - package main
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class main.MainClass
     
    MainClass - Class in main
    MainClass serves as the entry point to launch the game.
    MainClass() - Constructor for class main.MainClass
     
    maxHealth - Variable in class entities.Enemy
     
    menu - Variable in class ui.GameOverOverlay
     
    menu - Variable in class ui.LevelCompOverlay
     
    Menu - Class in gamestates
    The Menu class represents the main menu state of the game.
    Menu(Game) - Constructor for class gamestates.Menu
     
    MENU - Enum constant in enum class gamestates.GameState
     
    MENU_BACKGROUND - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    MENU_BUTTONS - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    MenuButton - Class in ui
    The MenuButton class represents a button in the game's menu.
    MenuButton(int, int, int, GameState) - Constructor for class ui.MenuButton
     
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Menu
     
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Handles mouse clicks for player actions and overlay interactions.
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in interface gamestates.StateMethods
     
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
    andles mouse click events and forwards the event to the corresponding game state.
    mouseDragged(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
     
    mouseEntered(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
     
    mouseExited(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
     
    MouseInputs - Class in Inputs
    The MouseInputs class handles mouse events and delegates the actions to the corresponding game state.
    MouseInputs(GamePanel) - Constructor for class Inputs.MouseInputs
     
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Menu
    Handles mouse movement events to detect hover on buttons.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Handles mouse moved to provide animation.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in interface gamestates.StateMethods
     
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
    Handles mouse movement events and forwards the event to the corresponding game state.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.GameOverOverlay
    Handles mouse movement events, updating the hover state of the buttons.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.LevelCompOverlay
    Handles mouse movement events, updating the hover state of the buttons.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.PauseOverlay
    Handles mouse movement, setting the hover state for buttons.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Menu
    Handles mouse press events, triggers button interactions.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Handles mouse pressed.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in interface gamestates.StateMethods
     
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
    Handles mouse press events and forwards the event to the corresponding game state.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.GameOverOverlay
    Handles mouse press events, updating the pressed state of the buttons
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.LevelCompOverlay
    Handles mouse press events, updating the pressed state of the buttons.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.PauseOverlay
    Handles mouse press events for the buttons.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Menu
    Handles mouse release events, triggers button actions.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Handles mouse clicks for player actions and overlay interactions.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in interface gamestates.StateMethods
     
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class Inputs.MouseInputs
    Handles mouse release events and forwards the event to the corresponding game state.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.GameOverOverlay
    Handles mouse release events, performing actions based on which button was clicked.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.LevelCompOverlay
    Handles mouse release events, performing actions based on which button was clicked.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class ui.PauseOverlay
    Handles mouse release events for the buttons, triggering their actions.
    move(int[][]) - Method in class entities.Enemy
    Moves the enemy left or right based on its walking direction.
    MovementComponent - Class in components
    Component responsible for handling horizontal movement and direction of an entity.
    MovementComponent() - Constructor for class components.MovementComponent
